title: Dashboard/Board View Impressions/Clicks Tracking
excerpt:
Description
Hi, we are looking to track impressions/clicks on some of our Dashboards and Board Views with key stakeholders. 
What are you trying to achieve
We are looking for ways to measure engagement.
